General.Name: China Rongzhong Finl Hldg Co
General.Description: China Rongzhong Financial Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides financial leasing services in China, Hong Kong, and Singapore. The company focuses on financing the needs of SMEs in Hubei province. It also provides financial leasing services in the categories of sales and leaseback and direct financial leasing. In addition, the company offers value- added services, such as due diligence, credit investigation, and debt collection services. Further, it provides money lending, credit management, and operating lease services for motor vehicles. It serves laser processing, plastics, industrial processing, textile and garments, hotel and leisure, and other industries. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Hong Kong, Hong Kong. China Rongzhong Financial Holdings Company Limited is a subsidiary of Goldbond Group Holdings Limited.
General.Address: Tower One, Lippo Centre, Hong Kong, Hong Kong
